title: Mobile app connection status change reflected on the Cloud
scenario: Cloud connection status (green/red mark) syncs correctly across Device Users, Inventory, and Device profile pages based on mobile app login/logout state
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Log in to the app with valid credentials.
3. Navigate to the Home screen and confirm the connection status shows a green mark (logged in).
4. Open a web browser and go to the Poly Cloud portal.
5. Navigate to the Device Users page and verify the user's connection status shows a green mark.
6. Navigate to the Inventory page and verify the same user/device shows a green mark.
7. Navigate to the Device profile page and verify the connection status shows a green mark.
8. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and log out.
9. Confirm the app's Home screen now shows a red mark (logged out).
10. Refresh the Poly Cloud portal pages: Device Users page, Inventory page, and Device profile page.
11. Verify that the connection status on all three Cloud pages now shows a red mark.
expected: The connection status (green mark for logged in, red mark for logged out) is accurately and consistently reflected across the Poly Studio Mobile app and all three Cloud portal pages (Device Users, Inventory, Device profile).
